creator: franz@bett.ag
text:
Maybe we could get this into base? I have a bunch of "these" HP Servers running FreeBSD and it's really time consuming to forget to cp zfsloader to /boot/ after running freebsd-update, and then having to remotely fix that (as all of them are a few hundred kilometers away).

Since i didn't see anything breaking on other systems, maybe this can be merged?
